title: CAR Bomboniere Rounded Glass Vase (26cm)
features: This vase is ideal to be used as a centre piece on the dining table
Each vase comes in its own colour gift box
description: From the manufacturer A brand inspired by you, and inspiring for you The Atmosphera brand offers a variety of furniture, lighting, home linen and decor items, helping you create the interior of your dreams. FURNITURE Whether you like comfort or design, if you are functional above all or if you are an amateur in any way, all models have been carefully selected for the quality of their manufacture and, above all, to satisfy all your desires. SOFAS AND ARMCHAIRS For your living room, choose a cute and modern armchair or sofa. The designer armchair is a must-have to add some style to your living room, bedroom or dressing room. In velvet or linen, there are several colors available. For your living room, choose a nice 2 or 3 seater sofa and add a little style to your living room. Design and comfort should go hand in hand, because the sofa is an essential element of decoration, but it is also the place where you will spend many hours resting. TABLES AND DESKTOPS Find your contemporary design table. Discover the selection of tables to combine aesthetics and comfort: a designer furniture to give a touch of encouragement to your living room. Find the table that suits you among our selection of furniture. CHAIRS Choose chairs with contemporary designs. Discover your selection to combine aesthetics and comfort: a velvet chair to give a touch of modernity, a designer seat to give a boost to your living room. Find the right chair for you among the selection of furniture. LIGHTING Find the floor lamp, suspension or table lamp that best suits your room and brings some light and warmth to your home. From charming lamps to pure or industrial style lamps, there's something for everyone! Available in various colors, they will seduce you and fit perfectly into your interior. HOME TEXTILES If the softness of a fabric is essential, it is because it is often in direct contact with our skin. Atmosphera takes great care of the choice of materials and finishes to create unique and varied products. Bedspreads, cushions, paintings. Because there is no room in which textiles do not have their place! DECORATION It is the little details that make a beautiful decoration! Whether frames, watches, mirrors or pictures. Find the items that go with your furniture and your interior. You can play with the combination of products, their sizes, their materials, their colors or their styles. Treat yourself and dare to accumulate! BOYS AND GIRLS Little ones are the spotlight with Atmosphera for kids! Whether you dream of princesses, pirates or animals, everyone will find their happiness through the proposed collections. Designed to combine charm and functionality, our products will bring comfort and softness to your children's daily lives!
